The '''''Fairfax''''' was a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] [[Bulk cruiser/Legends|bulk cruiser]] that was present and destroyed at the [[Battle of the Bajic Shipyards]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance]]''

[[File:ExecutorXWA4.png|thumb|left|260px|The ''Fairfax'' engages the ''Executor'' in the Vergesso Asteroids]]
